summary: Software engineer with 3+ years building **high-throughput, real-time data pipelines** processing tens of millions of daily transactions at a global bank. Deep **Python** and **SQL** proficiency with hands-on experience in **event-driven architectures**, message queues, and performance optimization. Active personal trader (crypto and prediction markets) with a track record of building **trader-facing market-data and alerting tools**.

Bank of America: Designed and maintained **real-time data pipelines** processing **tens of millions of transactions daily** across multiple services with retries, error handling, and load balancing.

Built an extensible **reference-data framework**: event-driven pipeline of services connected via **AMPS message queues**, querying multiple external APIs per trade event and handling failures gracefully.
Implemented a T+1 **trade reconciliation service** validating trade-ID uniqueness across counterparties and issuing corrections at millions of transactions per day.
Developed a parallelized **high-volume backreporting service**, automating a previously manual process with substantial speed and throughput gains.
Built a transformer service (internal model → outgoing XML) and DTCC response parser to **reconcile transaction statuses** in real time.
Optimized reliability, latency, and throughput of production services by orders of magnitude; wrote Python/Pandas tooling to **analyze 50-100GB datasets**.
Microsoft: Processed and annotated datasets used to train ML models; built Python pipelines to clean, transform, and generate reports on user-collected data for the data science team.
Northrop Grumman: Designed and released 50+ engineering drawings including flight and test components; performed structural analyses for large assemblies and fastener stacks.

Market Data Dashboard.desc: Ingests **real-time market data** (open interest, funding rates) from **Binance and Hyperliquid APIs**; Grafana visualization dashboard with automated SMS alerts on signal triggers.

Polymarket Scanner.desc: Scans Polymarket for **large trades and unusual activity**; real-time alerting pipeline delivering notifications to Discord.

Benchmark Agency Platform.desc: Multi-tenant **financial-intelligence dashboard** (revenue trends, equipment P&L, AI-generated recommendations) for a consulting agency with **3+ paying clients**; includes an 8-stage lead-gen data pipeline (Google Places API + LLM scoring, 20 tests).

bullets: **CUAIR (Cornell Unmanned Aircraft)** — autonomous plane systems: obstacle avoidance, object classification, airdrop; top team at AUVSI SUAS competition.
